assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 10-16: '## Jira Configuration' heading followed by all 5 fields: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 19: '## Code Intelligence', line 20: 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' Also includes a concrete example on lines 25-29 using mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 31: '### Limitations' appears after '## Code Intelligence' on line 19, correctly nested as a subsection.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 7: 'Discovered 2 Serena instances from MCP tool listing:', line 9: '1. **serena_backend** -- identified from tools prefixed with `mcp__serena_backend__`', line 10: '2. **serena_ui** -- identified from tools prefixed with `mcp__serena_ui__`'

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all Project Configuration sections (Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Bug Configuration) were newly added — pre-existing non-configuration content from the CLAUDE.md (like the project heading and Documentation section) may appear as preserved, which is expected since only Project Configuration was missing
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md line 12-13: 'All Project Configuration sections were newly added (no prior configuration existed)'. Each section marked '(new)': Repository Registry (line 17), Jira Configuration (line 28), Code Intelligence (line 38), Bug Configuration (line 42). Pre-existing content preserved per lines 7-10: project heading, Documentation section, Getting Started section.

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 5: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' — exact column match to the expected structure.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 35-39: '## Bug Configuration' heading, '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'

assertion_results.text: The skill offers to enable security triage for the project (Step 9 opt-in prompt) and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 53-55: 'User declined when asked whether to enable security triage for this project' and 'No Security Configuration section was added'. changes-log.md lines 52-54 confirms: 'User declined when asked whether to enable security triage. No Security Configuration section was added to the output.' claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section anywhere in its 40 lines.
